prompt: Create a combat effect anchor for the sanctified-arc family used by Renations tactics units.
scene: transparent background, no scenery, no floor, no UI, single isolated combat effect asset
subject: a sweeping martial slash arc with solemn ecclesiastical character, readable as a melee strike effect for a tactics RPG
style: stylized 2D painterly pixel-art-inspired combat VFX sprite, late-90s / early-2000s strategy game mood, not glossy, not anime, not photoreal
composition: single centered effect with tight bounds and strong silhouette, designed to read when rendered around 52px to 72px wide on a 96x48 tactical tile
lighting: ember-lit and disciplined, with restrained glow and no bloom overload
palette: aged brass, warm ivory, dark wine, muted ember orange
materials: brushed metal spark, parchment-light arc core, faint ash motes
constraints: transparent background; no characters; no weapons; no text; no extra objects; no oversized padding; clear readable center of motion; grounded martial tone
negative: generic fantasy spell swirl, neon sci-fi, cartoon slapstick, lens flare, oversharpening, watermark
